summary: Incomplete deliverable: missing fixture files (case_patch.txt, case_minor.txt, case_major.txt, case_breaking_footer.txt) and VERSION file—workflow cannot execute. Unpinned action refs (v4/v5 require 40-char SHA per requirements). Massive workflow duplication: backup/restore/test pattern repeated identically in lines ~27–35/36–44/45–53/54–62, needs composite action/loop. Python script solid error handling, but sys.exit() in functions limits unit testability. Manual file restore pattern fragile—could leave corrupted state on failure.
